name: URETHRAL CARCINOMA

demographics.Histo: SCC (60%), TCC (20%), adenocarcinoma (10%), undifferentiated ca. / sarcoma

dominant_finding: mass hypointense relative to normal corpora on T1WI + T2WI
distribution: T2-hyperintense + peripheral rim of low SI
discriminating_features: mass hypointense relative to normal corpora on T1WI + T2WI

MR: mass hypointense relative to normal corpora on T1WI + T2WI
lobulated iso- to hypointense on T1WI + T2WI
T2-hyperintense + peripheral rim of low SI
mass hypointense on T1WI + hyperintense on T2WI

clinical.Spread: direct extension + regional lymph nodes (superficial + deep inguinal + external iliac
clinical.Prognosis: poor (in 50% metastatic at presentation); survival rate of 50% for distal tumor,
